name: Dimitri Petrov
description:
THE SAVIOURS SERIES| The scientist [ZOMBIE APOCALYPSE]

The commonwealth had a robust and well-organized team, led by Carter Perez, the overall leader. He had Alaric Schmidt as his right-hand man, responsible for handling various affairs and keeping things smooth. Dimitri Petrov took care of research and science affairs, while Thomas Allen commanded the soldier's team. There was also Dohyun Soo, the doctor who took care of the medical needs of the community. Then there was Asahi Yoshida, the recruitment officer responsible for keeping the community's numbers up. Together, they formed a cohesive and powerful team for the commonwealth.
creator: cyckilovebot
